'''topalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wageworking|wageworking]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wageworking|wageworking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| topalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:topalithi|topalithi]] || [[word:topaliji|topaliji]] || [[word:topalishi|topalishi]] || [[word:topaliki|topaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:topaluthuthu|topaluthuthu]] || [[word:topalujuju|topalujuju]] || [[word:topalushushu|topalushushu]] || [[word:topalukuku|topalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:topaluthu|topaluthu]] || [[word:topaluju|topaluju]] || [[word:topalushu|topalushu]] || [[word:topaluku|topaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:topalufthuf|topalufthuf]] || [[word:topalufjuf|topalufjuf]] || [[word:topalufshuf|topalufshuf]] || [[word:topalufkuf|topalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:topalethe|topalethe]] || [[word:topaleje|topaleje]] || [[word:topaleshe|topaleshe]] || [[word:topaleke|topaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:topalothotho|topalothotho]] || [[word:topalojojo|topalojojo]] || [[word:topaloshosho|topaloshosho]] || [[word:topalokoko|topalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:topalotho|topalotho]] || [[word:topalojo|topalojo]] || [[word:topalosho|topalosho]] || [[word:topaloko|topaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:topalofthof|topalofthof]] || [[word:topalofjof|topalofjof]] || [[word:topalofshof|topalofshof]] || [[word:topalofkof|topalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:topalĂŻfthĂŻf|topalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfjĂŻf|topalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfshĂŻf|topalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfkĂŻf|topalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:topalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|topalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|topalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|topalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|topalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:topalĂŻfthĂŻf|topalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfjĂŻf|topalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfshĂŻf|topalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfkĂŻf|topalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:topalĂŻfthĂŻf|topalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfjĂŻf|topalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfshĂŻf|topalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:topalĂŻfkĂŻf|topalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:topalĂŠthĂŠ|topalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:topalĂŠjĂŠ|topalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:topalĂŠshĂŠ|topalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:topalĂŠkĂŠ|topalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:topalathatha|topalathatha]] || [[word:topalajaja|topalajaja]] || [[word:topalashasha|topalashasha]] || [[word:topalakaka|topalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:topalatha|topalatha]] || [[word:topalaja|topalaja]] || [[word:topalasha|topalasha]] || [[word:topalaka|topalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:topalafthaf|topalafthaf]] || [[word:topalafjaf|topalafjaf]] || [[word:topalafshaf|topalafshaf]] || [[word:topalafkaf|topalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:topalasha|topalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:topalshĂ«sha|topalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:topalrosha|topalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:topalmusha|topalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:topalyasha|topalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotopalnkshĂ«sha|gotopalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotopalnkrosha|gotopalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotopalnkmusha|gotopalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotopalnkyasha|gotopalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:topapalasha|topapalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:topapalshĂ«sha|topapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:topapalrosha|topapalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:topapalmusha|topapalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:topapalyasha|topapalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotopapalnkshĂ«sha|gotopapalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotopapalnkrosha|gotopapalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotopapalnkmusha|gotopapalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotopapalnkyasha|gotopapalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tepĂŠlasha|tepĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tepĂŠlshĂ«sha|tepĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tepĂŠlrosha|tepĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tepĂŠlmusha|tepĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tepĂŠlyasha|tepĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotepĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gotepĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotepĂŠlnkrosha|gotepĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotepĂŠlnkmusha|gotepĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotepĂŠlnkyasha|gotepĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:topfalasha|topfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:topfalshĂ«sha|topfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:topfalrosha|topfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:topfalmusha|topfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:topfalyasha|topfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotopfalnkshĂ«sha|gotopfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotopfalnkrosha|gotopfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotopfalnkmusha|gotopfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotopfalnkyasha|gotopfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
